hooks.command: cd /home/user/Mersad && CURRENT=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null) && if [ "$CURRENT" != "main" ] && [ -n "$(git log main..$CURRENT --oneline 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git checkout main && git merge "$CURRENT" --no-ff -m "Merge $CURRENT into main" && git push origin main; fi 2>/dev/null || true
